'''pabasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:deacylase|deacylase]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-b-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deacylase|deacylase]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pabasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæbæsæth|pæbæsæth]] || [[word:pæbæsæj|pæbæsæj]] || [[word:pæbæsæsh|pæbæsæsh]] || [[word:pæbæsæ|pæbæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pababasath|pababasath]] || [[word:pababasaj|pababasaj]] || [[word:pababasash|pababasash]] || [[word:pababasa|pababasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pabasath|pabasath]] || [[word:pabasaj|pabasaj]] || [[word:pabasash|pabasash]] || [[word:pabasa|pabasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pabafsath|pabafsath]] || [[word:pabafsaj|pabafsaj]] || [[word:pabafsash|pabafsash]] || [[word:pabafsaf|pabafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pabasatha|pabasatha]] || [[word:pabasaja|pabasaja]] || [[word:pabasasha|pabasasha]] || [[word:pabasaka|pabasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pabasath|pabasath]] || [[word:pabasaj|pabasaj]] || [[word:pabasash|pabasash]] || [[word:pabasa|pabasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pabasathal|pabasathal]] || [[word:pabasajal|pabasajal]] || [[word:pabasashal|pabasashal]] || [[word:pabasakal|pabasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pabasathatha|pabasathatha]] || [[word:pabasajaja|pabasajaja]] || [[word:pabasashasha|pabasashasha]] || [[word:pabasaka|pabasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pabasathan|pabasathan]] || [[word:pabasajan|pabasajan]] || [[word:pabasashan|pabasashan]] || [[word:pabasakan|pabasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pabasathaoro|pabasathaoro]] || [[word:pabasajaoro|pabasajaoro]] || [[word:pabasashaoro|pabasashaoro]] || [[word:pabasakaoro|pabasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
